description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular green plot, surrounded by several large, leafy trees. The bungalow features a prominent gable roof with blue-green shingles and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely painted wood or siding, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade. A driveway or path leads up to the entrance, and the property is bordered by a mix of open lawn and shaded areas from the trees. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural neighborhood, with another small building or garage visible nearby.
description: A single-story bungalow with a blue-green gable roof, covered front porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a green plot with surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement, with trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalow, the gable roof profile, and the adjacent smaller building.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the bungalow partially obscured by trees, showing the open lawn and distant small building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the bungalow's side elevation, roofline, and the proximity of the smaller building.
